answers: IP Address, Router, DNS, HTTP/HTTPS. Learn: Cisco CCNA, CompTIA Network+.
Networking basics: IP addresses identify devices, routers direct traffic, DNS translates domain names, and HTTP/HTTPS handles web communication.
To learn networking: start with IP addressing and subnetting, then TCP/IP, DNS, and routing. Cisco CCNA is a great certification to aim for.
Key concepts: IP address (device ID), Router (traffic director), DNS (phonebook of the internet), HTTP/HTTPS (web protocol).
